textByHashes.4345050c0c3992bdf26f59cac5575b9b7f087832: Will you join with me and protest against the evil desires of Necrovarus and his disciples?
textByHashes.bdb4b2efdf8d9b406bdfa5187e9fb10d61c6d5f6: I'd give you a petition form, but you look like you're carrying too much already.
textByHashes.624a6fac00dc319e009dbc435d4437f6d1c7de9d: Excellent, excellent!! Here - take this petition form, and try and get 10 signatures from the townsfolk.
textByHashes.4e70ba36ee946d3c9ba650017691618ab27fb6b1: Blown away in the sea breeze, hey? Oh well, can't be helped. I'd give you another one, but you look like you're carrying too much already.
textByHashes.c854c6f31768460dbdac57be617f9db93deb787e: Blown away in the sea breeze, hey? Oh well, can't be helped. Here's another one, but you'll have to start from scratch again.
textByHashes.f49667833c1613f9c773bf5e1c2479c44f32c24e: Come on - you haven't even started yet! You need 10 more signatures.
textByHashes.368bb2852feff0fb168d938294b3e7f155e89fb1: Well, that's a start I suppose You need more signatures.
textByHashes.bc7ca2353875eb3ed608d3274ae5d5bd02b62e98: Not doing bad I see! You need 6 more signatures.
textByHashes.8fceb79ae258c71daafaf7e3ee63a632207bd9cd: Are you sure you haven't done this type of thing before? You need 3 more signatures.
textByHashes.86d53988a69114c3c6d28a982ac28212814f9c1d: Very nearly there!! Only 1 more signature to go.
textByHashes.a24c40408bcfe858286394bca6e20ad24dd29284: You've got them all! Now go and present it to Necrovarus!!
textByHashes.dcd2786996d06ab0429b9ae7477081b24e1cc6e1: There's always a need for a healthy interest in politics.
textByHashes.b3d73c109a764b96694832858a7e586ad7ea4ad0: Will you join with me and protest against the evil ban of Necrovarus and his disciples?
textByHashes.071a078c0e64054d67904cafb611e6bafff30a78: Ah, the youth of today - so apathetic to politics.
textByHashes.edff2e8009ef0e1be1eaec76b3093355e21ac881: Rise up my fellow ghosts, and we shall be victorious!!
textByHashes.b91ed16291ad70a047d6961f4689cbe2b5327e7a: Rise together, Ghosts without a cause!!
textByHashes.2f86740a1ea3083b985decaa2f94c1406b4c0bfd: United we conquer - divided we fall!!
textByHashes.13720a7134de0f8a463aba059939c6ce2525cc8f: Let Necrovarus know we want out!!
textByHashes.f16d7e8f23cda1329e00d7db39e2b3080e2f6f62: Don't stay silent - victory in numbers!!
